svg.title: 2D floor plan of a study center with two study rooms, three offices, kitchen, toilet, pause space, and a side exit
svg.desc: Portrait floor plan in cream grid-paper style: Study room B at top, toilet and kitchen below it, pause space on the left, three offices stacked on the right, study room A at the bottom, and an exit labeled sortie on the left wall. Indigo indicator pills point to tables, desk, sofa, exit, and bookshelf.
